generation.prompt: Painterly cel-shaded 2D top-down fantasy RPG art, faded pastel palette, soft rim light and gentle cel-shading, atmospheric fog with aerial perspective (distant objects desaturate and fade into mist), melancholic lonely wistful-wonder mood. Slightly-tilted bird's-eye top-down view for a tile-based game. Muted, low-saturation colors only, no bright primary colors, no glossy or neon highlights. Original dark-fantasy world, not based on any existing franchise. 3.5 to 4 head-tall proportions, readable costume silhouette, gentle soft shading, thin or no hard outline. Character: Anika, a small orphan girl, worn simple muted-sage (#A8B79B) pinafore dress over a faded cream blouse, short tousled hair, a wistful lonely expression, small and slight, muted palette. Character walk-cycle sprite sheet arranged in a strict 4x4 grid of TALL rectangular cells (portrait aspect, each cell clearly taller than wide). Row 1: walking while facing down toward the viewer. Row 2: walking while facing left. Row 3: walking while facing right. Row 4: walking while facing up away from the viewer. 4 animation frames per row. The character is the same size and centered in every cell with a small margin, full body visible. Uniform flat solid magenta background (#FF00FF) behind everything. No labels, no numbers, no grid lines, no text.
